payload.code:
# Load the built-in mtcars dataset
data(mtcars)

# Run linear regression of mpg on hp
model <- lm(mpg ~ hp, data = mtcars)

# Print the summary
print(summary(model))

# Extract and print key statistics for clarity
cat("\nKey Statistics:\n")
cat("R-squared:", summary(model)$r.squared, "\n")
cat("Adjusted R-squared:", summary(model)$adj.r.squared, "\n")
cat("F-statistic p-value:", pf(summary(model)$fstatistic[1], summary(model)$fstatistic[2], summary(model)$fstatistic[3], lower.tail = FALSE), "\n")
